what: Adaptive NSPLIT + full V dequant in stage1 + single mid buffer
why: Current fixed NSPLIT=16 wastes work for small kv_len (1024 tokens = only 64 per split). Reduce NSPLIT to 4 for kv<=1024, 8 for kv<=4096. Also dequant V fully in stage1 and store 512 bf16 values instead of 2x256 f32 (halves stage2 bandwidth). Eliminates interleave in stage2.

what: Hybrid MXFP4 K + FP8 V: use dot_scaled for Q*K^T with MXFP4, but load FP8 KV for V accumulation
why: V dequant from MXFP4 is expensive (branching fp4 decode per element). FP8 V is just load + multiply by scalar scale. 2x bandwidth vs MXFP4 but eliminates all dequant compute. Also avoids lo/hi split - direct 512-dim bf16 output.
